overall.description: Third-person survival horror gameplay showing a blonde-haired character in a green jacket navigating a dark, rainy night in an overgrown residential backyard. The character uses a flashlight to explore narrow passages between lattice fences and old buildings, transitioning from open yard to covered walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown residential backyard with scattered debris

events.description: gazebo tower with rooftop light becomes visible through the rain ahead

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the rainy backyard, flashlight illuminating the overgrown path and debris ahead

entered.detail: rectangular metal frame lying on the ground among the grass
tall wet grass covering the ground throughout the yard
wooden lattice fence partially covered in vines marking the yard boundary
small tower structure with pointed roof and illuminated light on top

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dark, rain-soaked backyard with overgrown grass and scattered debris. A wooden lattice fence borders the left side while a gazebo tower with a glowing light emerges in the distance. The flashlight cuts through the heavy rain, illuminating the wet vegetation as the character begins to move forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between lattice fences and brick walls

events.description: moves from open yard into narrow fenced corridor beside the gazebo structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tight passage between the gazebo and fence, flashlight scanning the wet brick walls

entered.detail: wooden lattice fence covered in ivy running along the right side
weathered brick wall with dark stains from rain

segments.scene_description: The character passes the gazebo tower and enters a narrow corridor flanked by a lattice fence on the right and a brick wall on the left. The space becomes more confined as the character moves deeper into the passage, with rain continuing to fall heavily overhead.

events.description: building with windows and air conditioning units comes into view at end of alley

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the narrow fenced pathway toward the building with visible windows ahead

entered.detail: exterior wall of residential building with wooden siding
window with metal bars and external air conditioning unit

segments.scene_description: Moving through the narrow alley, the character approaches a residential building with barred windows and AC units. The lattice fence recedes into the distance on the right while the building wall dominates the left side, creating a corridor leading toward the structure ahead.

events.description: enters covered corridor where rain is no longer falling directly overhead

agents.ego_description: moving along the building wall into the sheltered covered walkway, flashlight reflecting off wet concrete surfaces

entered.detail: overhead roof structure providing shelter from the rain
doorway or entrance to the building at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the building exterior into a covered walkway where the rain is blocked by an overhead roof. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with artificial light sources becoming visible ahead as the character approaches what appears to be a building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked backyard that gradually tightens into a dark, enclosed residential corridor. It begins in an open area of overgrown grass and debris, with a flashlight cutting through heavy rain toward a distant, glowing gazebo tower. As the character passes the tower, the environment shifts into a narrow passage flanked by a wooden lattice fence and a brick wall, increasing the sense of confinement. The scene then opens slightly as the camera follows the character past barred windows and AC units along the side of a building before turning into a covered walkway. Finally, the rain is blocked by an overhead roof, plunging the surroundings into deeper shadow as the character approaches a lit building entrance.
